summary.intent: Fix a bug in the FocusScope component's trap listener logic, guided by Codex review findings on a PR.
summary.outcome: Two P1 fixes were implemented with TDD (red→green), all 54 tests passed, mutation score 23/0/11, spec updated, and changes committed and pushed with resolved Codex review threads.

repo: The trap listener in FocusScope must only be installed when `trapped: true`; installing it unconditionally was an over-correction introduced during a prior ReleaseTrap fix.
The project uses a mutation testing gate alongside lint and spec gates as part of the pre-push xci-fast pipeline.
Spec files live at spec/components/utility/focus-scope.md and must be kept in sync with implementation changes.
Codex review is triggered via `@codex review` comment and may require re-triggering after replying/resolving threads.

code.finding: The trap listener registration was incorrectly placed outside the `trapped: true` guard after a prior over-correction to a ReleaseTrap fix; Codex's second-pass review caught this regression.
Spec required multiple edits (5 Edit calls) to sync with the two P1 behavioral fixes, suggesting the spec has non-trivial coverage of trap listener lifecycle behavior.

workflow: Codex first-pass advice can be incomplete and its second pass may catch regressions introduced by following the first pass — don't blindly apply Codex suggestions without verifying they don't over-correct.
TDD red→green cycle (write failing tests first, confirm red, then fix) was used to validate the behavioral contract before patching.
Polling Codex review status via a foreground until-loop (120s interval) avoids manual checking while staying in-context.

friction: Codex's first-pass review gave incomplete advice that led to an over-correction, requiring a second review cycle to catch the regression.
Multiple rounds of reply/resolve/re-trigger were needed before Codex produced actionable findings.
Spec required 5 separate edits to fully sync, suggesting either fine-grained doc structure or iterative discovery of what needed updating.
open_items: Mutation score of 23/0/11 — the 11 surviving mutants may indicate gaps in test coverage worth revisiting.
The original ReleaseTrap fix that caused the over-correction should be reviewed to confirm it is still correct after this patch.
